name: Bouclier-Connexion
description: Fantassin renforcé anti-intrusion dont les implants interceptent les tentatives de hacking. Mur vivant contre la subversion électronique.
prompt: Sci-fi grimdark cyberpunk, L'Omni-Réseau faction. Reinforced infantry electronic warfare specialist, dark armor with extra antenna arrays and blinking cold blue lights on helmet, thick black neural cables, holding geometric rifle with data-stream holographic display. Dystopian atmosphere, highly detailed, cinematic lighting.
